compiled_state.description:
## GHA reconcile-bridge-canary: inject signing key + flip committer email to bot

The canary writes non-exempt tickets via the normal `rebar` CLI (`rebar create bug` /
`comment` / `transition` in `.github/workflows/reconcile-bridge-canary.yml`), so it will
SIGN AUTOMATICALLY through `_seam.append_event` once the identity + key are configured — no
code change needed here (unlike the reconciler). The Rebar Bot identity ticket already exists
(task bffe: `594c-9dcf-5ad6-4e6d`), so git-email resolution to the bot works.

- **Secure key injection (concrete):** in a workflow step, `echo "::add-mask::$REBAR_BOT_SIGNING_KEY"`
  first (so it can never surface in logs), then write it to a job-local file — e.g.
  `install -m 600 /dev/null "$RUNNER_TEMP/rebar-bot-signing-key"` then
  `printf '%s' "${{ secrets.REBAR_BOT_SIGNING_KEY }}" > "$RUNNER_TEMP/rebar-bot-signing-key"`
  (mode 0600) — and export `REBAR_IDENTITY_SIGNING_KEY` (or set `identity.signing_key`) to that
  path. The runner's `$RUNNER_TEMP` is discarded at job end.
- Set the canary's committer email to `joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com` (from the current bridge
  default) so git-email resolution maps to the Rebar Bot identity.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `reconcile-bridge-canary.yml` masks the secret (`::add-mask::`), writes it to a `0600` file under `$RUNNER_TEMP`, sets `REBAR_IDENTITY_SIGNING_KEY`/`identity.signing_key` to that path, and sets the committer email to `joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com`; the key is never logged or committed.
- [ ] A canary run (triggered via `workflow_dispatch` on `reconcile-bridge-canary.yml`) creates a bug/comment/transition whose event is signed as Rebar Bot: capture the created ticket id from the run log and confirm `rebar verify-authorship` (or `rebar verify-identity`) reports it `verified` and attributed to identity `594c-9dcf-5ad6-4e6d`.
- [ ] No code change is introduced here (the CLI signs automatically via the seam); the key is never logged or committed.
compiled_state.title: GHA reconcile-bridge-canary: inject signing key + flip committer email to bot
